# Jeremie Louvaert

> Open-source developer and founder of AKURATE.STUDIO. Builds production-grade custom nodes for ComfyUI — the leading node-based UI for Stable Diffusion and AI image/video generation workflows.

## Projects

- [ComfyUI-API-Optimizer](https://github.com/jeremieLouvaert/ComfyUI-API-Optimizer): Production-grade custom nodes for optimizing external API workflows in ComfyUI. API cost tracking with budget enforcement, deterministic hash-based caching, and lazy execution bypass. Supports Kling, Magnific, Banana.dev, RunPod.
- [comfyui-prompt-assembler](https://github.com/jeremieLouvaert/comfyui-prompt-assembler): Utility nodes for assembling prompts from multiple string inputs with ON/OFF toggles per slot. Standard 8-slot, compact 4-slot, and weighted 6-slot variants.
- [comfyui-wireless-link-simple](https://github.com/jeremieLouvaert/comfyui-wireless-link-simple): Wireless data transmission nodes for ComfyUI inspired by Blackmagic Fusion. Send/Get nodes transmit any data type without visible wires.

## Links

- Website: https://akurate.studio
- GitHub: https://github.com/jeremieLouvaert
